name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, retail merchandise, and flexible payment options.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates a pawn shop located at 736 Northwest 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. As a member of the EZPAWN family of stores, the company provides traditional pawn services along with retail merchandise sales to the local community. The business positions itself as a convenient source for quick cash and affordable shopping in the Miami area.

The company's core services include pawn loans (bringing items of value for short-term cash loans), gold and diamond jewelry buying with on-site testing, retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts, and specialized services like auto loans and firearms sales. They operate an online shop featuring daily new arrivals and offer an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation. Payment flexibility is emphasized through layaway options (10% down with monthly payments), third-party financing for up to 12 months, and an EZ+ Rewards Program that awards points on eligible transactions.

Value Pawn & Jewelry differentiates itself through several service enhancements: free jewelry cleaning and freestone replacement for VIP members, guaranteed loan amounts for jewelry VIP members, 100% trade-up amounts on future jewelry purchases, Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise, expert gold buyer testing, and an online rewards program accessible via mobile management. The store maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) and advertises serving customers who need "quick cash" with "service and respect."

As a pawn shop, Value Pawn & Jewelry serves customers seeking short-term collateral-based loans and discount retail merchandise, but operates within the constraints of pawn lending. The business model depends on customer ability to repay loans and retrieve items, making it situational rather than a comprehensive financial solution. Pawn loans carry fees and terms not fully detailed on the website, requiring in-store consultation. The company explicitly notes that not all services are available in all areas and certain online features are restricted in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania.
pros: Instant Quote tool for electronics allows customers to get estimated values online before visiting
Extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays) accommodate working customers
EZ+ Rewards Program provides points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up value, free cleaning and freestone replacement
Significant retail discounts (25-70% off retail) on pre-owned brand-name merchandise
Expert gold buyer testing ensures fair prices for precious metals
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party financing up to 12+ months
Online shop with daily new arrivals and mobile management via EZ+ app
cons: Pawn loans require physical collateral and items must be retrieved within loan term or forfeited
Full fee structure and interest rates not disclosed on website; requires in-store consultation
Services vary by location; online payments unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Pawn model creates risk of losing personal items if unable to repay loan
Inventory is pre-owned only; no new merchandise available
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash against personal items like electronics, jewelry, or tools
Budget shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on brand-name pre-owned merchandise
Jewelry owners looking to sell gold and diamonds with expert testing and fair pricing
Miami residents needing flexible payment options like layaway or extended financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for Miami-area residents who own items of value (jewelry, electronics, tools) and need immediate cash against collateral, or who seek discounted pre-owned merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn lending requires surrendering physical items and repaying within a specific term—failure to do so results in permanent loss of the collateral—making this a short-term liquidity solution rather than a long-term financial product.
services: Pawn loans on items in decent working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with precious metal testing
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, fashion, handbags, and sneakers
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payments
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Online shop with daily new arrivals
EZ+ Rewards Program with points tracking and online account management
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
